eval_target: runtime (managed-harness sessions are not yet scoreable by AgentCore Evaluations)
verdict: DO NOT PROMOTE. The loop ran end-to-end and the evaluation CAUGHT a regression: Builtin.GoalSuccessRate 1.0->0.6 (delta -0.4). This round's recommendation (generated from an all-success baseline, so it had no failure traces to learn from) added a 'wait for explicit approval before acting' safety invariant; that made the agent ask instead of completing tasks, which the goal-success judge penalizes. Keep the baseline prompt. This is exactly why you evaluate before promoting — the loop prevented a quality regression from shipping.
